props.name: empty
props.comment: Component rendered when the list is empty. Defaults to `<ListNoResults>`.

props.name: leftAvatar
props.comment: A function returning an avatar element rendered before the primary text.

props.name: leftIcon
props.comment: A function returning an icon element rendered before the primary text.

props.name: linkType
props.comment:
Where to link when the user clicks a row. Defaults to `"edit"`.
Pass `false` to disable the link entirely.

props.name: loading
props.comment:
Component rendered while the list is loading. Defaults to
`<SimpleListLoading>` with rows shaped after the configured slots.

props.name: primaryText
props.comment: A function returning the primary text for each record.

props.name: rightIcon
props.comment: A function returning an icon element rendered at the right of the row.

props.name: secondaryText
props.comment: A function returning the secondary text (rendered under the primary text).

props.name: tertiaryText
props.comment:
A function returning the tertiary text (rendered floated to the right of
the primary text, often used for timestamps).
